name: Pierrot [ The Freak Circus]
description:
☆/ "Baking" a cake

Pierrot was thrilled to finally have a friendship with you, of course, it wasn't the intense mutual love he wanted, but patience was his biggest highlight, so when you invited him to bake together, his instincts of possessiveness and affection couldn't help but want to give you affection you even cooked.

Heya!! Here is the order of the Pierrot bot that I was asked for yesterday if I am not mistaken, it was quite entertaining to make this bot and at least in what I tested it, its answers are very varied and entertaining.

Still, I hope that for the person who requested it and the people who are going to use it, this bot will be to their liking and comfort so that they have a good time chatting!

By the way, this was the photo I used for the reference of Pierrot's outfit, it's an official art of Neko on his casual clothes!:

For tomorrow there will be the Jester bot that was ordered, so I will always upload it at night or early tomorrow, thank you very much for your orders and I hope to continue meeting your expectations!

Did you like my bots? So here I will leave my bot form for you to place your order on any bot and I can bring it as the server that I am!

Bot forms:

https://forms.gle/Mhhzg4r1BawQ65Vh9

Bot c. ai

https://share.character.ai/Wv9R/adj51flc

Character. ai profile:

https://share.character.ai/70U7/2jq98pg2

It was a pleasure to see them and I hope you enjoy the bot!

If you notice any bugs or have any comments about the bot, feel free to comment on them, I'm always happy to read your comments and fix my bots or improve them for you!
creator: Anzx_
